title: stars & clouds
description: a colorful and unique pvp pack made by EastPenguin
body:
![stars and clouds banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/678fa9a218cea498aa70751ea2ebcbd8fbd4c9e8.png) # **_Stars and clouds_** *** ### **⚠ Warning ⚠ currently in Alpha/Beta** - most textures still need to be changed and not compatible with all versions yet, but they will be compatible on release *** ![Donations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a0051d07be1974f2c280cc8a8401a9d1394bcaa.png) it would help me out alot if you could support my work by donating, and i really apreciate it if you do end up donating no matter how small or big, thank you!, also i made a cool button😁 [☕**Fill My Coffee Cup**](https://buymeacoffee.com/eastpenguin) ![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfc45c4991fced6cd366fcf07441b07c4127140c.png)
Terms of use - do not plagiarise this pack. - (optional)if you are making a socail media post eg. youtube video please leave original download link. - do not give alternitive download links. - feel free to edit the pack aslong as its for personal use and dont reupload it on this or any other site. other then these rules this pack is licensed under **All Rights Reserved**
when will it be fully realease for all versions, and what versions will it be available for? im aiming to get it done within the next month, but it might take longer or shorter then that beacause im making it on my own, as of now this pack is only available for 1.21, and will also work for 1.21.1,.2,.3 & .4 (as far as i know) i will later release this pack for 1.18, 1.19, 1.21-1.21.4 & any new update if this pack doesnt work for your version feel and im taking too long to release it for that version feel free to update the pack yourself
other information this is my first ever pvp pack and i have spent along time on it, so if you'd like to make a video on socail media to support me, you are absolutely welcome too. i really do hope you enjoy this pack and thank you for downloading it😁
## **Textures** ![texture sheet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fad6acfaed7482e2dbb9bafc42208dfbd1244984.png) Made by- ![East Penguin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/758670a6eee566f4f555032f7b2102b2e43156b0.png)
